# darkanchor / nginz — full agent index

This file provides expanded agent-ingestible content for the nginz product family by darkanchor.

## Organization
- Name: darkanchor
- Site: https://darkanchor.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/darkanchor

## Products

### nginz
- License: Apache-2.0
- Category: Open Source
- Tagline: Native modules for stock nginx. Active health checks, dynamic upstreams, JWT auth, Prometheus metrics — free, no fork, no patch.
- URL: /products/nginz
- Native modules: acme, cache-purge, cache-tags, canary, circuit-breaker, consul, dynamic-upstreams, echoz, graphql, healthcheck, jsonschema, jwt, nftset, njs, oidc, pgrest, prometheus, ratelimit, redis, requestid, transform, upstream-balancer, waf, wechatpay, worker-events

### nginz-njs
- License: Apache-2.0
- Category: Policy Layer
- Tagline: Scripted policy layer for nginx njs. Compose authorization, feature flags, and workflow orchestration — testable, reusable, no second runtime.
- URL: /products/nginz-njs
- Scripted modules: authz, control-api, feature-flags, health-gateway, http-client, metrics, mlcache, request-tracing, response-templating, response-transform, session, webhook, workflow

### nginz-token
- License: BSL-1.1
- Category: AI Gateway
- Tagline: AI gateway inside your nginx. Token-level rate limiting, cost tracking, semantic caching, prompt security — no SaaS proxy.
- URL: /products/nginz-token
- Status: In development

## Documentation

All module documentation is under /docs/reference/modules/ (native) and /docs/reference/scripted-modules/ (njs).

### nginz native modules
- /docs/reference/modules/acme — ACME / Let's Encrypt: automatic TLS certificate issuance and renewal
- /docs/reference/modules/cache-purge — Cache Purge API: operator-facing cache invalidation by tag and prefix
- /docs/reference/modules/cache-tags — Cache Tags: group cached responses for grouped invalidation
- /docs/reference/modules/canary — Canary Routing: gradual traffic rollout by percentage or header
- /docs/reference/modules/circuit-breaker — Circuit Breaker: fail fast with half-open recovery
- /docs/reference/modules/consul — Consul Integration: service discovery and KV store at the edge
- /docs/reference/modules/dynamic-upstreams — Dynamic Upstreams: change backend membership without reloads
- /docs/reference/modules/echoz — Echoz Debug Output: inspect variables and request bodies during development
- /docs/reference/modules/graphql — GraphQL Gateway: depth limiting and introspection control
- /docs/reference/modules/healthcheck — Health Checks: active probes, readiness, and Prometheus metrics
- /docs/reference/modules/jsonschema — JSON Schema Validation: reject bad payloads at the edge
- /docs/reference/modules/jwt — JWT Authentication: validate bearer tokens and extract claims
- /docs/reference/modules/nftset — nftables IP Policy: kernel-level IP allow/block via nftables
- /docs/reference/modules/njs — NJS Orchestration: QuickJS engine for request-time scripting
- /docs/reference/modules/oidc — OpenID Connect: browser SSO login flow with PKCE
- /docs/reference/modules/pgrest — PostgREST API: PostgreSQL REST API with JWT auth
- /docs/reference/modules/prometheus — Prometheus Metrics: native /metrics endpoint with histograms
- /docs/reference/modules/ratelimit — Rate Limiting: fixed-window counters shared across workers
- /docs/reference/modules/redis — Redis: direct access to hot data via RESP protocol
- /docs/reference/modules/requestid — Request ID: UUID4 generation and X-Request-ID propagation
- /docs/reference/modules/transform — JSON Transform: trim upstream JSON to the shape clients need
- /docs/reference/modules/upstream-balancer — Upstream Balancer: sticky sessions with cookie/header affinity
- /docs/reference/modules/waf — WAF: SQL injection and XSS pattern detection
- /docs/reference/modules/wechatpay — WeChat Pay: signature signing and verification
- /docs/reference/modules/worker-events — Worker Events: cross-worker shared-memory event ring

### nginz-njs scripted modules
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/authz — Authorization: composable rules for method, path, header, JWT claim, and remote OPA
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/control-api — Control API: operator surface over flags, cache, sessions, and tracing
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/feature-flags — Feature Flags: deterministic per-user bucketing for gradual rollouts
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/health-gateway — Health Gateway: multi-source health aggregation (deferred)
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/http-client — HTTP Client: typed ngx.fetch() wrapper with retry and middleware
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/metrics — Metrics: cross-module instrumentation and StatsD rendering
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/mlcache — MLCache: two-level cache with stale-while-revalidate
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/request-tracing — Request Tracing: distributed trace context propagation
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/response-templating — Response Templating: generate responses from request facts
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/response-transform — Response Transform: JSON field masking, dropping, and renaming
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/session — Session: cookie lifecycle and shared-dictionary store
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/webhook — Webhook: signed delivery composition over HTTP Client
- /docs/reference/scripted-modules/workflow — Workflow: parallel and sequential subrequest orchestration

## Other Pages
- /products — Product overview
- /contact — Contact form (POST /api/contact)
